title: WiFi QR Code
description: Generate a scannable WiFi QR code from network details, fully local.

notice.title: Generated locally
notice.body: The QR code is generated in your browser. The network name and password are never uploaded to any server. Scan it to join the network instantly.

preview.title: QR preview
preview.empty: Enter a network name (SSID) to generate the QR code.

error.render: Failed to generate the QR code, please check your input.
